# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

version: '3'
services:
  elk-logstash:
    image: "docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:${TAG:-6.5}" # 1
    container_name: "elk-logstash" 
    ports:
      - "${LOGSTASH_PORT:-5044}:${LOGSTASH_PORT:-5044}/tcp" 
    volumes: 
      - "./logstash-docker.conf:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline/logstash-docker.conf"
    networks:
      - elk
  elk-logstash-kibana:
    image: "docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:${TAG:-6.5}" # 2 
    container_name: "elk-logstash-kibana"
    environment: 
      ELASTICSEARCH_URL:"http://${ELK_HOSTNAME}:${ELASTICSEARCH_PORT:-9200}"
      XPACK_MAIN_ENABLED: "false"     
    depends_on:
      - elk-logstash # 3
    ports: 
      - "${LOGSTASH_KIBANA_PORT:-5601}:${LOGSTASH_KIBANA_PORT:-5601}/tcp" 
    networks:
      - elk 
  elk-elasticsearch:  
    image: "docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:${TAG:-6.5}" # 4
    container_name: "elk-elasticsearch"    
    environment: 
      ES_JAVA_OPTS:"-Xms256m -Xmx768m"
      xpack.security.enabled:"false"
      discovery.type:"single-node"
      bootstrap.memory_lock:"true"  
    ulimits: # 5
      memlock: 
        soft: -1
        hard: -1 
    ports: 
      - "${ELASTICSEARCH_PORT:-9200}:${ELASTICSEARCH_PORT:-9200}/tcp"
    volumes:  
      - "./esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data"  
    networks:
      - elk
networks:
  elk:  #6
    driver: bridge
